lowcode.model/pom.xml.general_idea: Update the target Java version property from 17 to 21 to align with the migration goal.
lowcode.model/pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project continues to compile against Java 17, failing to utilize or enforce Java 21 features and compatibility.

lowcode.model/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Lombok version to a release compatible with Java 21.
lowcode.model/pom.xml.why_exists: Older Lombok versions may fail to compile or process annotations correctly on Java 21 due to internal API changes or lack of support.

lowcode.model/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade maven-compiler-plugin to a version that supports Java 21 compilation.
lowcode.model/pom.xml.why_exists: Older compiler plugin versions may not recognize Java 21 syntax or may fail to compile code targeting Java 21.

lowcode.model/pom.xml.general_idea: Replace deprecated source/target configuration with the modern release configuration in maven-compiler-plugin.
lowcode.model/pom.xml.why_exists: The 'source' and 'target' options are deprecated in newer compiler plugin versions; using 'release' is required for correct cross-compilation and module path handling in Java 9+.

lowcode.model/src/main/java/de/zeb/lowco.general_idea: Refactor instanceof checks to use pattern matching for cleaner code.

lowcode.model/src/main/java/de/zeb/lowco.after: if ( element instanceof MaskenelementMitFeldIf if1 ) { ergebnis.add( if1 ); }
